subject: La Corniche near Monaco at golden hour, with shimmering Mediterranean light on the sea, rocky cliffs, and lush coastal vegetation rendered in loose impressionist brushwork
Self-portrait with vibrant floral headdress, intense gaze, and symbolic Mexican iconography
Abstract composition of bold geometric shapes, vivid primary colours, dynamic diagonal lines, and floating circles evoking spiritual harmony
A sunlit flower field of sunflowers and wildflowers under a swirling sky, rendered in thick impasto brushstrokes with intense yellows and blues
The face of a rabbit in extreme close-up, with detailed fur texture, soft pink nose, and glistening eyes catching the light
A dreamy floating village scene with a whimsical blue goat drifting above rooftops, surrounded by bouquets of flowers and lovers embracing under a crescent moon
